name: Superbowl Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine popcorn, peanuts, and shredded cheddar cheese in a large bowl.
2. Set aside the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, mix melted butter with one teaspoon of lemon pepper, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add two teaspoons of cumin to the mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Add 1/4 teaspoon of cayenne pepper and stir.
6. Incorporate 2 teaspoons of chili powder and stir.
7. Finally, add 1 teaspoon of paprika and stir.
8. Pour the seasoned butter mixture over the popcorn and cheese in the large bowl.
9. Toss everything together to coat evenly.
10. This recipe serves approximately six people.
